actionCalls.description: Calls an action that invokes an expression set which applies rules and criteria for calculation the risk score and risk level of a change request.
actionCalls.name: CalculateRiskScore
actionCalls.label: Calculate Risk Score

actionCalls.description: Calls an action to create ‌records from risk evaluation questionnaire responses that are used to calculate the risk score and risk level.
actionCalls.name: CreateRiskEvalQstRespRec
actionCalls.label: Create Risk Evaluation Questionnaire Response Records

assignments.description: Sets the value for the hasEvaluationFailed variable as True when the Create Risk Evaluation Questionnaire Response Records fails to execute.
assignments.name: SetErrorWhenCreateRiskEvaluationQuestionnaireResponseRecordsFails
assignments.label: Set Error When Create Risk Evaluation Questionnaire Response Records Fails

assignments.description: Sets the value for the hasEvaluationFailed variable as True when the expression set that calculates the risk score fails to execute.
assignments.name: SetErrorWhenExpressionSetFails
assignments.label: Set Error When Expression Set Fails

assignments.description: Sets values for the related issue count and estimated lead time for implementation of a change request.
assignments.name: SetRiskEvaluationVariablesForChangeRequest
assignments.label: Set Risk Evaluation Variables for Change Request

assignments.description: Sets the values for each question, its response, and whether it’s required or not in the risk evaluation questionnaire.
assignments.name: SetValuesForRiskQuestionnaireResponses
assignments.label: Set Values for Risk Questionnaire Responses

choices.name: Adequate_Time_To_Implement
choices.choiceText: Adequate time to implement, verify, roll back, and deal with issues

value.stringValue: Adequate time to implement, verify, roll back, and deal with issues

choices.name: Exceeding_Implementation_Window
choices.choiceText: Moderate risk of exceeding window to implement, verify, and roll back

value.stringValue: Moderate risk of exceeding window to implement, verify, and roll back

choices.name: Insufficient_Time_To_Implement
choices.choiceText: Insufficient time to implement, verify, and roll back within the window

value.stringValue: Insufficient time to implement, verify, and roll back within the window

formulas.description: Calculates the number of days between the Created On date and the Estimated End Time date.
formulas.name: EstimatedLeadTimeInDaysFormula

formulas.description: Assigns a value to the estimated lead time based on specific thresholds. The formula returns 0 if the number of days is less than 6, returns 6 if the number is between 6 and 15, and returns 16 if the number is 16 or greater.
formulas.name: EstimatedLeadTimeRangeFormula

formulas.description: Assigns a value to the related issue count based on specific thresholds. The formula returns same for counts lesser than or equal to 1, returns 2 for counts between 2 and 6, and 7 for counts greater than 6.
formulas.name: RelatedIssueCountRangeFormula

recordLookups.description: Gets the change request record with an ID that matches the changeRequestId passed into the flow. Stores the result in the Change Request from Get Change Request Record record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetChangeRequestRecord
recordLookups.label: Get Change Request Record

recordLookups.description: Gets the incidents and problems related to the change request record.
recordLookups.name: GetChangeRequestRelatedIssueRecords
recordLookups.label: Get Change Request Related Issue Records

recordUpdates.description: Updates the risk score and risk level fields of a change request based on the output from the Calculate Risk Score element.
recordUpdates.name: UpdateRiskScoreAndRiskLevel
recordUpdates.label: Update Risk Score and Risk Level

screens.description: Allows the flow user to provide responses to a risk evaluation questionnaire for questions related to the type of change, complexity, and other basic details.
screens.name: ScreenCollectRiskEvaluationQuestionnaireDetailsForBasicInformation
screens.label: Collect Risk Evaluation Questionnaire Details For Basic Information

fields.name: Required_Information
fields.fieldText: * = Required Information

fields.name: ChangeImpactPicklist
fields.fieldText: How critical is the impact of this change on a configuration item (CI) or business service?

fields.name: ChangeComplexityPicklist
fields.fieldText: How complex is this change? (Consider the number of impacted CIs, tasks, and teams.)

fields.name: ChangeRollbackPicklist
fields.fieldText: What is the level of difficulty to roll back this change?

fields.name: ChangeRedundancyPlanPicklist
fields.fieldText: Is there a redundancy plan in place for this change?

fields.name: ChangeImplementationPicklist
fields.fieldText: When is this change scheduled to be implemented?

screens.description: Allows the flow user to provide responses to a risk evaluation questionnaire for questions related to the implementation of change.
screens.name: ScreenCollectRiskEvaluationQuestionnaireDetailsForImplementationInformation
screens.label: Collect Risk Evaluation Questionnaire Details For Implementation Information

fields.name: Required_Information_1
fields.fieldText: * = Required Information

fields.name: TeamExperiencePicklist
fields.fieldText: What is the implementation team’s experience with similar changes?

fields.name: ImplementationDurationPicklist
fields.fieldText: What is the duration of the implementation window?

fields.name: ImplementationTimRequiredPicklist
fields.fieldText: How many hours are required to implement this change?

fields.name: EnvironmentStablePicklist
fields.fieldText: Is the environment stable to support this change?

fields.name: PostDeploymentTestPicklist
fields.fieldText: Can the change be tested post deployment?

value.stringValue: How critical is the impact of this change on a configuration item (CI) or business service?

variables.description: Stores the ID of a change request passed into the flow.
variables.name: changeRequestId

value.stringValue: How complex is this change? (Consider the number of impacted CIs, tasks, and teams.)

variables.description: Stores the number of days between the date on which a change request record is created and the estimated end date when the change is implemented.
variables.name: EstimatedLeadTime

variables.description: Stores a boolean value that indicates whether the Create Risk Evaluation Questionnaire Response Records fails or succeeds.
variables.name: hasEvaluationFailed

value.stringValue: What is the implementation team’s experience with similar changes?
How many hours are required to implement this change?
What is the duration of the implementation window?

variables.description: Stores a collection of riskEvaluationQuestionnaireResponses records and is passed into the flow.
variables.name: listOfResponses

value.stringValue: Is there a redundancy plan in place for this change?

variables.description: Stores the number of incidents and problems associated with the change request in the Get Change Request Related Issue Records record collection.
variables.name: RelatedIssueCount

variables.description: Stores an Apex record that contains the details of each question, its response, and whether the question is required or not.
variables.name: riskEvaluationQuestionnaireResponses

value.stringValue: What is the level of difficulty to roll back this change?
When is this change scheduled to be implemented?
Is the environment stable to support this change?
Can the change be tested post deployment?
